subcodes.first_line: O friends! This servant hath attained the utmost joy from your praiseworthy and renowned services, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران این عبد نهایت سرور از خدمات مشکوره و مشهوره شما حاصل نموده زیرا فی
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
